info.title: AS Cost Basis API
info.description: Retrieves realized and unrealized gain/loss information.

tags.name: Cost Basis
tags.description: Retrieves realized and unrealized gain/loss information.

parameters.name: Schwab-Client-Ids
parameters.description:
`masterAccount=X`: Retrieves preferences for the accounts under the master.
`account=X`: Retrieves preferences for the account.

get.summary: Retrieves realized gain/loss transactions and transaction lots.
get.description: Retrieves realized gain/loss transactions and transaction lots. Returns negative values in parentheses.

parameters.name: filter[startDate]
parameters.description: Filters transactions closed on or after the passed date (EST). Requires `filter[endDate]` be passed. The earliest and default date supported is January 1st of the year 2 years back.

parameters.name: filter[endDate]
parameters.description: Filters transactions closed on or before the passed date (EST). Requires `filter[startDate]` be passed. The default value is the current date.

parameters.name: page[cursor]
parameters.description: The cursor of the starting record of data to be returned.

parameters.name: page[limit]
parameters.description: The number of records to be returned. The maximum value is 100.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: The field by which to sort the records of data.

get.description: Retrieves unrealized gain/loss positions. Returns negative values in parentheses.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: The field by which to sort the records of data.

post.description: Retrieves unrealized gain/loss position lots. Returns negative values in parentheses.

AccessToken.description: The **OAuth** token associated with the advisor.

HeaderCorrelId.name: Schwab-Client-CorrelId
HeaderCorrelId.description: The Correlation ID is a GUID that can be used to track a service call if support is needed.

QueryShowAccount.name: showAccount
QueryShowAccount.description:
Specifies how account numbers are displayed in the response. The values are:
`Mask`: Masks the account number as '*****6789'.
`Show`: Shows the account number.

QuerySortDirection.name: sortDirection
QuerySortDirection.description: The direction by which to sort the records of data.

QueryPageCursor.name: page[cursor]
QueryPageCursor.description: The cursor of the starting record of data to be returned.

QueryPageLimit.name: page[limit]
QueryPageLimit.description: The number of records to be returned. The maximum value is 500.

type.description: The type of the object returned.

formattedMasterAccount.description: The unique identifier of the master account.

initialCostBasisSource.description: The initial source of cost basis data.

accountingMethod.description:
The accounting method used to calculate cost basis. The values are:
`FIFO`: First In First Out
`HCLOT`: High Cost Lot
`BTAX`: Tax Lot Optimizer
`LIFO`: Last In First Out
`LCLOT`: Low Cost Lot

averageMutualFunds.description: Indicates whether cost basis is averaged for mutual funds.

adjustCostBasisForFixedIncome.description: Indicates whether cost basis is adjusted for fixed income assets.

isAutoSubscribed.description: Indicates whether accounts are automatically subscribed with master preferences.

statementType.description: The statement type. Only the 'Customizable' statement type supports cost basis reporting.

formattedAccount.description: The unique identifier of the client account.

isNonTaxableAccount.description: Indicates whether the account is non-taxable.

initialCostBasisSource.description: The initial source of cost basis data.

accountingMethod.description:
The accounting method used to calculate cost basis. The values are:
`FIFO`: First In First Out
`HCLOT`: High Cost Lot
`BTAX`: Tax Lot Optimizer
`LIFO`: Last In First Out
`LCLOT`: Low Cost Lot

averageMutualFunds.description: Indicates whether cost basis is averaged for mutual funds.

adjustCostBasisForFixedIncome.description: Indicates whether cost basis is adjusted for fixed income assets.

onGainLossTab.description: Indicates whether the account is subscribed to the Cost Basis Reporting Service and displayed on the SAC Gain/Loss tab.

hasSchwabAllianceLogOn.description: Indicates whether the account has an active Schwab Alliance logon.

costBasisOnStatements.description: The cost basis display level on the statement.

yearEndGainLossReport.description: The delivery method of the year-end gain/loss report.

type.description: The type of the object returned.

formattedAccount.description: The unique identifier of the client account.

totalKnownRealizedGainLossDollar.description: The net total dollar amount of all realized gains/losses in the account for the specified period.

totalKnownRealizedGainLossPercent.description: The net total percent value of all realized gains/losses in the account for the specified period.

totalKnownShortTermRealizedGainLoss.description: The net total of all short-term realized gains/losses in the account for the specified period.

totalKnownLongTermRealizedGainLoss.description: The net total of all long-term realized gains/losses in the account for the specified period.

totalKnownProceeds.description: The sum of proceeds for all closing transactions in the account for the specified period.

totalKnownCostBasis.description: The sum of cost basis associated with all closing transactions in the account for the specified period.

transactionId.description: The unique identifier of the transaction.

symbol.description: The ticker or options symbol (primary), 9-character CUSIP number (secondary), or the 7-digit internal Schwab security number (tertiary).

totalRealizedGainLossDollar.description: The dollar amount of realized gain/loss for all lots.

totalRealizedGainLossPercent.description: The percent value of realized gain/loss for all lots.

shortTermRealizedGainLoss.description: The realized gain/loss for short-term holdings based on the duration the lots were held.

longTermRealizedGainLoss.description: The realized gain/loss for long-term holdings based on the duration the lots were held.

quantity.description: The number of shares sold. The value is positive for long positions and negative for short positions.

totalProceeds.description: The total proceeds for the closing transaction.

costBasis.description: The sum of cost basis of all lots in the closing transaction.

acquiredOrOpenedDate.description: The date (EST) when the position was acquired or opened.

soldOrClosedDate.description: The date (EST) when the position was sold or closed.

lotId.description: The unique identifier of the lot.

realizedGainLossDollar.description: The dollar amount of realized gain/loss.

realizedGainLossPercent.description: The percent value of realized gain/loss.

shortTermRealizedGainLoss.description: The realized gain/loss for the short-term holding based on the duration the lot was held.

longTermRealizedGainLoss.description: The realized gain/loss for the long-term holding based on the duration the lot was held.

quantity.description: The number of shares sold. The value is positive for long positions and negative for short positions.

proceeds.description: The total proceeds for the closing transaction.

proceedsPerShare.description: The proceeds per share. For short positions, the amount received per share when the short position was opened.

costBasis.description: The cost basis of the closing transaction. The value is positive for long positions and negative for short positions.

disallowedLoss.description: The disallowed loss resulting from wash sales.

adjustedRealizedGainLossDollar.description: The adjusted dollar amount of realized gain/loss.

adjustedRealizedGainLossPercent.description: The adjusted percent value of realized gain/loss.

adjustedCostBasis.description: The original cost basis plus/minus any adjustments and amortization.

adjustedCostPerShare.description: The total adjusted cost basis of the security divided by the number of shares purchased.

adjustedDisallowedLoss.description: The adjusted disallowed loss resulting from wash sales.

acquiredOrOpenedDate.description: The date (EST) when the lot was acquired or opened.

soldOrClosedDate.description: The date (EST) when the lot was sold or closed.

holdingPeriod.description: The amount of time the lot is held by the client, or the period between the purchase and sale of the lot. Returns the number of days for a short-term holding period. Returns "Long Term" for a long-term holding period. The number of days is displayed for short positions even if greater than 1 year.

type.description: The type of the object returned.

isAmortized.description: Indicates whether the amortization accounting method was used.

formattedAccount.description: The unique identifier of the client account.

totalKnownUnrealizedGainLossDollar.description: The net total dollar amount of all unrealized gains/losses in the account.

totalKnownUnrealizedGainLossPercent.description: The net total percent value of all unrealized gains/losses in the account.

totalKnownCostBasis.description: The sum of cost basis of all positions in the account.

totalKnownMarketValue.description: The total market value of all positions in the account.

positionId.description: The unique identifier of the position.

symbol.description: The ticker or options symbol (primary), 9-character CUSIP number (secondary), or the 7-digit internal Schwab security number (tertiary).

unrealizedGainLossDollar.description: The dollar amount of unrealized gain/loss.

unrealizedGainLossPercent.description: The percent value of unrealized gain/loss.

quantity.description: The number of shares. The value is positive for long positions and negative for short positions.

costBasis.description: The cost basis of the position. The value is positive for long positions and negative for short positions.

marketValue.description: The total market value of the position. The value is positive for long positions and negative for short positions.

positionIds.description: Passes the positions. A maximum of 200 positions can be requested at once.

showAccount.description:
Specifies how account numbers are displayed in the response. The values are:
`Mask`: Masks the account number as '*****6789'.
`Show`: Shows the account number.

id.description: The unique identifier of the client account.

type.description: The type of the object returned.

positionId.description: The unique identifier of the position.

lotId.description: The unique identifier of the lot.

unrealizedGainLossDollar.description: The dollar amount of unrealized gain/loss.

unrealizedGainLossPercent.description: The percent value of unrealized gain/loss.

quantity.description: The number of shares. The value is positive for long positions and negative for short positions.

costBasis.description: The cost basis of the lot. The value is positive for long positions and negative for short positions.

currentPrice.description: The real-time price during market hours or the closing price during after-market hours for stocks/equities.

todaysChangeInPriceDollar.description: The dollar value of change in price since the last close.

todaysChangeInPricePercent.description: The percent value of change in price since the last close.

marketValue.description: The total market value of the lot. The value is positive for long positions and negative for short positions.

todaysChangeInValueDollar.description: The dollar value of change in value of the lot since the last close.

todaysChangeInValuePercent.description: The percent value of change in value of the lot since the last close.

adjustedUnrealizedGainLossDollar.description: The adjusted dollar amount of unrealized gain/loss.

adjustedUnrealizedGainLossPercent.description: The adjusted percent value of unrealized gain/loss.

adjustedCostBasis.description: The original cost basis plus/minus any adjustments and amortization. Returned only if there are amortization (accretion) values for the bond other than those calculated using the amortization (accretion) method.

adjustedCostPerShare.description: The cost per share/unit based on the adjusted total cost for bonds. Calculated by dividing the adjusted total cost by the number of shares/units.

acquiredOrOpenedDate.description: The date (EST) when the lot was acquired or opened.

holdingPeriod.description: The holding period for the lot. Returns the number of days for a short-term holding period. Returns "Long Term" for a long-term holding period. The number of days is displayed for short positions even if greater than 1 year.

Notes.description:
The notes. Can include:
`a`: Data for this holding was edited or provided by the advisor.
`e`: Data for this holding was edited or provided by the client.
`t`: Data for this holding was edited or provided by a third party.
`u`: Cost basis was reported as unknown on the cost basis report.
`w`: Cost basis was adjusted due to a wash sale.

actual.description: The actual number of records returned.

total.description: The total number of records available.

nextCursor.description: The cursor of the next record. This can be used for the page[cursor] value of the next request. Will be an empty string once there are no more records to retrieve.

actual.description: The actual number of records returned.

total.description: The total number of records available.

nextCursor.description: The cursor of the next record. This can be used for the page[cursor] value of the next request. Will be an empty string once there are no more records to retrieve.

status.description: The HTTP status code associated with this occurrence of the error.

title.description: The short title describing the category of the error.

detail.description: The error description associated with this occurrence of the error. Provides details of the error. The actual error may vary.

ErrorInfoSource.description: The optional extended error information pointing to the source that triggered the error.

pointer.description: The JSON pointer (RFC6901) to the associated entity in the request document (e.g., "/data" for a primary data object or "/data/attributes/{property name}" for a specific attribute).

parameter.description: The input parameter which caused the error.

header.description: The request header which caused the error.

status.description: The HTTP status code associated with this occurrence of the error.

title.description: The short title describing the category of the error.

status.description: The HTTP status code associated with this occurrence of the error.

title.description: The short title describing the category of the error.

SchwabClientCorrelId.description: The Correlation ID is a GUID that can be used to track a service call if support is needed.
